brief: Fidji Simo departs OpenAI's AGI role amid escalating US-Iran airstrikes, while new research explores performance incentives in visualization and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI AGI role due to illness; US and Iran trade airstrikes; new evidence in Charlie Kirk murder case; multiple international stories on politics, health, and entertainment.
papers_summary: Papers investigate performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, sign language recognition with smart gloves, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Fidji Simo departs OpenAI's AGI role amid escalating US-Iran airstrikes, while new research explores performance incentives in visualization and brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI AGI role due to illness; US and Iran trade airstrikes; new evidence in Charlie Kirk murder case; multiple international stories on politics, health, and entertainment.
en.papers_summary: Papers investigate performance-based incentives in visualization experiments, clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China, sign language recognition with smart gloves, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 今日重點：英國工黨啟動新黨魁選舉，貝安德有望接任；美國與伊朗互相發動空襲，局勢升溫；中國異見者董廣平偷渡韓國成功，稱「怕死只有死路一條」；廣西洪災暴露預警漏洞；研究方面，腦機介面在中國的臨床轉譯及傳統國畫視覺化分析有新進展。
zh.news_summary: 英國工黨開始提名新黨魁，貝安德被視為熱門人選；美國對伊朗發動新一輪空襲，伊朗反擊科威特和卡塔爾，中東緊張加劇。中國異見者董廣平成功偷渡韓國並獲加拿大庇護，廣西洪災因預警滯後導致損失，澳門國安法首案起訴歐錦新涉顛覆罪。
zh.papers_summary: 一篇論文調查了中國腦機介面臨床試驗與監管現狀，另一篇提出基於構圖圖的視覺分析系統用於傳統國畫分析。

todays_image.caption: The polka dot dress's uniform pattern of dots echoes the steady rhythm of AGI research, now missing a crucial dot as Fidji Simo steps away due to illness.
todays_image.title: The Polka Dot Dress
